trivia_bullets.text: Rimrock Knight is a double-sided Adventure card: 3/1 Dwarf Knight (1R) that can't block; adventure half Boulder Rush is a one-mana instant giving target creature +2/+0 until end of turn. The dwarf hurling a boulder doubles as art-flavor justification for Boulder Rush.
No flavor text on either the creature or adventure face. Illustrated by Chris Rallis, known for muscular, physically-committed figure work across multiple MTG sets.

One of ELD's most-played red commons in Standard: Boulder Rush at one mana is unusually efficient, leaving a 3/1 body waiting in exile. Reprinted on The List (PLST-ELD-137), indicating continued demand post-rotation.

Dwarf Knight creature type signals non-court mountain-dwellers of Eldraine. Dwarves in ELD are associated with rugged borderland identity — the boulder-carrying image fits a warrior who uses terrain as a weapon rather than forged steel.

related_cards.name: Fervent Champion
related_cards.note: Boulder Rush's +2/+0 combines with Fervent Champion's +1/+0 attack trigger for substantial pump on another knight

related_cards.name: Brimstone Trebuchet
related_cards.note: Rimrock Knight entry untaps the trebuchet; same knight-synergy package

related_cards.name: Embercleave
related_cards.note: Premier red rare; Boulder Rush commonly used to set up Embercleave's damage threshold
